name: Sweet Potato Cornbread
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup unbleached all-purpose flour (I used whole wheat flour)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. With an electric mixer, beat egg whites until fluffy.
3. Add brown sugar and blend well.
4. Add apple sauce, OJ, sweet potato, and soy milk. Mix thoroughly.
5. Gradually add dry ingredients (cornmeal, flour, baking powder, cinnamon, cardamom, salt). Mix well.
6. Fold in corn kernels and chopped green chilies by hand. The batter will be thick.
7. Divide the batter evenly between two 9-inch pie tins or cake pans coated with nonstick cooking spray.
8. Bake until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean and the top springs back when touched. This usually takes about 25 minutes, though the recipe may say 15 minutes.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool on a rack. Makes 16 servings.
